title: madhuca elongata
intro: Madhuca elongata is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as a tree with medicinal properties. The plant is known for its seeds, which contain a compound called butyrospermol, a natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Madhuca elongata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among other ailments. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used to make oils, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, or consumed orally to support overall health and wellness.
